subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #21 - PreK Orange
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
Weather
It was a long indoor week, but your children were absolute troopers. Thank you to our teachers for creating engaging activities that kept bodies moving and helped everyone get their wiggles out—
Going on a Bear Hunt
,
The Floor is Lava
, musical chairs (with enough chairs for everyone), and yoga were all big favorites.
Next week looks warmer, and we’ll get outside as soon as possible, so please send in snow gear so we can enjoy the playground.
Music Presentations
Some of the Music Museum presentations have been postponed until this coming week. The children are so engaged and excited by music, and they’ve learned many facts about musicians and different genres.
Thank you for your partnership and support.
February Lunch Orders
Please remember to order your lunches for February.
If you have any questions or concerns please text (1-646-226-8790) or email learn@socds.com.
Annemarie
Art with Ms. Jenny
Ms. Jenny introduced American Folk Art.  She started with researching Heather Galler - who is living in Upstate New York.
Exploring bold lines and mixed media to represent the everyday objects.
Some of the classes were also experimenting with how to represent a cylinder filled with liquid.
Upcoming
Don't forget Lunch Orders for February
February 2nd. Groundhog Day
around February 6th - 100th Day of School
Saturday, February 7th -
Friends of SO Public Library Jewelry Sale 11-4pm at the Baird
February 13th -
Wear Red Day
February 16th - SOCDS Closed for Presidents Day
Feb. 17th - Lunar New Year
Friday, Feb. 28th - PEP Spirit Day Pizza Cupcake Lunch
Updated School Calendar
Class Directory
SimplyGourmet Lunch Link
SOCDS Summer Camp 2025 - March 1st Early Registration
@SOCDSMOMENTS
Logistics
Dress Appropriately for the Weather:
Please dress your child in appropriate gear for the day.  In general (except this really, really cold weather) -- there is no bad weather just poor clothing.
Morning Snack
:  Please send in a morning, and if your child is staying for enrichment please send in an afternoon snack as well.  We generally allow children to choose their food and to listen to their bodies, but if you have any particular preference for what they eat and when, please just label the containers and we will accommodate.  Please remember we are a NUT FREE environment.
Water Bottles
:  Please send in a labeled water bottle with your child each 
day.  We do make sure that they drink water throughout the day.  We have two water fountains which we use to refill the bottles (so they may come home full.)
Parking:
Please remember that Vose Avenue is an active busy street.  Please pull up on the
school side
of Vose in front of the school.  It is safest to go around the block instead of turning around in driveways.  For your child's safety please try to have them leave your car from the sidewalk side of the car.
Please do not block our neighbors driveway, even for a few minutes.
Tuition:
As I receive payments I update the statement and send you a copy.  If you do not receive those from me please let me 
know.
Hours
Morning Care 7:30-8:30am
Morning Drop off is between 8:30-9am
Afternoon Pick Up is between 3:10- 3:20pm
Extended Day 3:20-5:30/5:45pm
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
You are receiving this email because your child attends SOCDS.  If you no longer wish to receive these updates, please unsubscribe below.
